title: Stories attach to any item via one wildcard relation
description: One relation story_includes_item (source story, target any kind) links a story to any task, phase, or milestone. A story's scope is its outbound story_includes_item edges.

evidence.reference: relation_types has story_contains_task (story->tasks) only; no story->any relation

impact: Stories can only link to tasks; the model needs a story to span any level.
